sections.label: Verse 1
lines: En in thuk in a zai tuikhuk,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: tuikhuk hong luang hi, tu ni’n,
Hong pai khempeuh man ngen lo in,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Natna thuak in hong si, Lamdang sisan guntui
Vuk bang hong ngosak ding, Vuk bang hong ngosak ding.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tua thupha tuikhuk pan! Upna tawh A si sung bual leng,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Lungdamna thupha na zak ciang, Hong pai in, ci’n hong
Upna tawh A si sung bual leng,
Vuk bang hong ngosak ding, Vuk bang hong ngosak ding.
